events.description: Workshop: Leadership Essentials. Date: Saturday, March 7, 2026. Time: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM. Location: Leadership Institute Training Center, 800 Corporate Drive, Suite 500, Chicago, IL 60601. What to bring: Laptop (optional), Business cards for networking, Comfortable attire. Schedule: 9:00 AM - Welcome & Introductions; 9:30 AM - Module 1: Leadership Foundations; 11:00 AM - Break; 11:15 AM - Module 2: Communication Strategies; 12:30 PM - Lunch (provided); 1:30 PM - Module 3: Team Building; 3:00 PM - Break; 3:15 PM - Module 4: Action Planning; 4:00 PM - Wrap-up & Certificates. Parking: Free garage parking available. Catering: Lunch and refreshments included.

importance.description: Event importance: 'action_required' for closures, schedule changes, deadlines the user must act on; 'fyi' for themed days, birthdays, informational items that are nice to know
